title: Text Randomizer
description: Randomizes all translated text in Minecraft.
body:
# Text Randomizer

Randomizes all translated text in Minecraft.

## Features
- Randomizes translated text
- Supports all languages and mods (hopefully)
- A setting to randomize item models for even more chaos
- A setting to shuffle items within creative tabs
- In-game config with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) and [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) installed
